title: Glowing Golden Canadian Fish Skewers
description: These malty and chewy skewers are perfect for a paleo-friendly brunch. Featuring fish stock and a robata-grill, they're a unique twist on traditional Canadian cuisine.
instructions: Cut the cod fillets into 1-inch chunks and place them in a large bowl.
In a small saucepan, combine the fish stock, malt syrup, and sesame seeds.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Add the coconut oil to the bowl with the cod and toss to coat.
Thread the cod onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a robata-grill or grill pan and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Brush the skewers with the fish stock mixture during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.
